response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile engineer with genuine systems-programming depth, but he does not meet the mandatory requirements of this role. His professional C++ experience amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the required 5-10 years on Windows; his recent decade is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. He shows no SQL Server or Oracle experience (MySQL/MongoDB only) and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure — RIDE Capital is retail-investment fintech, not capital markets. The low-latency work at Sociomantic is impressive but in DLang, not C++, and does not substitute for the hard requirements.
strengths: Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, caching, real-time data at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testing-tool authorship
Broad polyglot background with some fintech-adjacent exposure (RIDE Capital)
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, versus the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MySQL/MongoDB
No fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge

key_factors.factor: Missing capital markets / fixed income domain expertise
Low-latency systems and strong engineering fundamentals
